comment.body:
JFinn... we know each other from last january... ;))
you know it well how 0DTE goes.
you have to be fast, and as substack doesn't have API i have to type my trades. if you can't follow, or can't get idea out of that, you better stay off. 
trading signal chat is not trading signals is to follow, but to give yo uan idea.. illustration, of something. 
i don't give it regularly.

today i had like 5 winning trades.
3 quick ES trades and 3 0DTEs, one of them was a loss.
i keep saying for these last two ones that "small allocation", "no leverage", bcs conviction is not that high.
also, if you read my post, i literally described why we will experience suppressive structural flows, and i just explained about it above in this chat.
Also note, that I have puts into march opex since feb 19 that i bought as hedge.

if you don't read the post. don't understand what I'm talking about, don't look at my shared charts as everybody else in this chat room does, you can't understand the strategy.
my point is, that it is one thing to ask questions to clarify something, but to come at me or anybody is different. 
You can't do that here.
